parameters.name: decision_text
parameters.value: =EOM NUDGE QUEUED owner={{ $json.owner }} task_id={{ $json.taskId }} packet_id={{ $json.packetId }} expires_at={{ $json.expiresAt }} | packet_text={{ $json.packetText }} |owner={{ $json.owner }} |task_id={{ $json.taskId }} |expires={{ $json.expiresAt }}

meta.description: CT-0421-06: polls Supabase op_decisions every 60s for eom_review_needed events, deduplicates against eom_acked, applies 4h TTL, formats compact review packet, writes eom_nudge_queued for Hammerspoon pickup.
meta.notes: Requires n8n variables: SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY. Set via n8n Settings > Variables. Hammerspoon poll_eom_queue.sh picks up eom_nudge_queued events and injects into claude.ai browser tab.
